languages.original_text: {n}The Seneschal clears his throat, looking bemused.{/n} "I... shall bear in mind Master Nuncius's eloquence."

languages.text: {n}Сенешаль озадаченно прочищает горло.{/n} "Я... возьму красноречие господина Нунциуса на заметку".
{n}The Seneschal clears his throat, looking bemused.{/n} "I... shall bear in mind Master Nuncius's eloquence."

languages.text: {n}家令長は困惑した様子で、咳払いをする。{/n}「マスター・ヌンシウスの雄弁さを心に留めておきます」
languages.original_text: {n}The Seneschal clears his throat, looking bemused.{/n} "I... shall bear in mind Master Nuncius's eloquence."

languages.text: {n}Der Truchsess räuspert sich und wirkt amüsiert.{/n} "Ich ... werde mir Meister Nuncius' Eloquenz merken."
languages.original_text: {n}The Seneschal clears his throat, looking bemused.{/n} "I... shall bear in mind Master Nuncius's eloquence."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Truchsess räuspert sich und wirkt amüsiert.{/n} "Ich ... werde mir Meister Nuncius' Eloquenz merken."

languages.text: {n}El senescal carraspea confundido.{/n} «Yo... procuraré tener presente la elocuencia de maese Nuncius».
languages.original_text: {n}The Seneschal clears his throat, looking bemused.{/n} "I... shall bear in mind Master Nuncius's eloquence."

traits.locale_text: {n}El senescal carraspea confundido.{/n} «Yo... procuraré tener presente la elocuencia de maese Nuncius».

languages.text: {n}Seneşal, şaşkın bir ifadeyle boğazını temizliyor.{/n} "Ben... Üstat Nuncius'un belagatini aklımda tutacağım."
languages.original_text: {n}The Seneschal clears his throat, looking bemused.{/n} "I... shall bear in mind Master Nuncius's eloquence."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seneşal, şaşkın bir ifadeyle boğazını temizliyor.{/n} "Ben... Üstat Nuncius'un belagatini aklımda tutacağım."

languages.text: « Je... tâcherai de garder à l'esprit l'éloquence de Maître Nuncius, » {n}répond le sénéchal, perplexe, après s'être éclairci la gorge.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Seneschal clears his throat, looking bemused.{/n} "I... shall bear in mind Master Nuncius's eloquence."

traits.locale_text: « Je... tâcherai de garder à l'esprit l'éloquence de Maître Nuncius, » {n}répond le sénéchal, perplexe, après s'être éclairci la gorge.{/n}

languages.text: {n}总领清了清嗓子，神情困惑。{/n}“我……会将努恩修斯大师的雄辩之才铭记于心。”
